src/main/App.java.general_idea: Replace inline Javalin configuration and route registration with a centralized AppConfig factory method.
Remove imports for Javalin, Dotenv, and controllers that are no longer used in the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed imports for io.javalin.Javalin, io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.Dotenv, etc.

src/main/App.java.general_idea: Remove the hardcoded ASYNC_TIME_OUT constant as configuration is now handled externally.
Remove the large block comment describing the server API endpoints from the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed the multi-line comment block starting with 'Server API:'

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated legacy MongoClient with the modern synchronous driver API (MongoClients) to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and current driver versions.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.client.MongoClient; import com.mongodb.client.MongoClients; ... client = MongoClients.create(clientSettings);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Update connection string handling from MongoClientURI to ConnectionString to align with the new driver API.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.ConnectionString; ... ConnectionString connectionString = new ConnectionString(MONGO_URI);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Refactor codec registration to use the new CodecRegistry builder pattern required by the modern driver.
Integrate automatic POJO codec provider to allow direct mapping of Java objects to BSON without manual document conversion.
Register custom codecs for specific domain classes (MetadataCodec, SectionCodec) to handle complex BSON structures.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import Form.FormMetadata.MetadataCodec; ... CodecRegistries.fromCodecs(new IntegerCodec(), new MetadataCodec())

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace dotenv library usage with direct System.getenv calls for environment variable retrieval.
Define explicit constants for database names corresponding to different deployment environments.
Implement a method to retrieve the correct MongoDatabase instance based on a DeploymentLevel enum.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static MongoDatabase getDatabase(DeploymentLevel deploymentLevel) { switch (deploymentLevel) { ... } }

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Add explicit methods for closing the client connection and dropping databases for better resource management.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static void closeClientConnection() { client.close(); } ... public static void dropDatabase(...)

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Make the enum implement a custom Message interface to standardize response handling.
Add import for the custom Message interface.
Add import for org.json.JSONObject to support JSON serialization.
Convert bare enum constants to constructor-based values with descriptive error message strings.
Add new INVALID_PARAMETER status for input validation errors.
Add new FAIL_TO_CREATE status for creation failures.
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.human_impl: FAIL_TO_CREATE("Could not create user and/or org")

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Add new SUCCESS status for successful operations.
Remove specific invalid character enum variants in favor of a generic one.
Add a field to store the error message string associated with each enum constant.
Add a constructor to initialize the error message field for each enum constant.
Add method to convert the status to a JSON response string.
Add helper method to extract the error name from the message string.
Add helper method to extract the error description from the message string.
Add method to serialize the status to a JSONObject with standard keys.
Add overloaded method to serialize the status to a JSONObject with a custom message.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Refactor controller to use dependency injection and delegate business logic to service classes.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Added constructor with MongoDatabase and ActivityDao, replaced inline logic with EnrollOrganizationService, FindMemberService, etc.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on Argon2 library for password hashing.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Removed imports for de.mkammerer.argon2 and replaced manual hashing with service delegation.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on Auth0 JWT library.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Removed imports for com.auth0.jwt and commented out JWT generation code.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency for logging annotation.
Use String.strip() instead of trim() for whitespace handling.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Replaced .trim() calls with .strip() on string fields like orgName, email, etc.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Standardize error response format using Message class.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Replaced custom status objects with Message.getErrorName() and getErrorDescription().

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Add new endpoint for finding members of organizations.
Add new endpoint for listing organizations.
Add new endpoint for inviting users to an organization.
Update enrollment form fields to match new schema.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Changed input parsing to include firstName, lastName, birthDate, twoFactorOn, orgEIN, etc.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Add environment variable configuration for organization URLs.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Added static final fields for NEW_ORG_TESTURL and NEW_ORG_ACTUALURL from System.getenv.

src/main/User/User.java.general_idea: Add Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code for logging and setters.
Add BsonProperty annotations to map Java fields to MongoDB document fields.
Add Jackson annotations for JSON serialization compatibility.
Expand the User class to include comprehensive personal and account details.
src/main/User/User.java.human_impl: private String firstName; private String lastName; ... private ObjectId id;

src/main/User/User.java.general_idea: Implement constructor validation to ensure data integrity upon user creation.
Add methods to serialize the User object to JSON and Map formats.
src/main/User/User.java.human_impl: public JSONObject serialize() ... public Map<String, Object> toMap()

src/main/User/User.java.general_idea: Add a method to update user properties based on a request object.
Implement equals and hashCode methods for proper object comparison.
src/main/User/User.java.human_impl: @Override public boolean equals(Object o) ... @Override public int hashCode()

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Refactor UserController to delegate business logic to dedicated Service classes (e.g., LoginService, CreateUserService) instead of implementing it inline.
src/main/User/UserController.java.human_impl: new LoginService(userDao, tokenDao, activityDao, username, password, ip, userAgent).executeAndGetResponse()

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Introduce constructor-based dependency injection for DAOs and Database connections to replace static configuration access.
src/main/User/UserController.java.human_impl: public UserController(UserDao userDao, TokenDao tokenDao, ...) { this.userDao = userDao; ... }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.

Add Apache Commons Lang3 for utility methods.

Add JUnit Jupiter Engine for test execution.
Add JUnit Vintage Engine to support JUnit 4 tests.
Add JUnit 4 dependency explicitly.
Upgrade Byte Buddy library to a newer version.
Upgrade SLF4J API to a newer version.
Add Logback Classic implementation for SLF4J.
Add Logback Core library.
Add Apache PDFBox Tools for PDF manipulation.
Add Apache PDFBox Examples dependency.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV processing.

Add Jackson Core library.

Procfile.general_idea: Remove the explicit -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 JVM argument because UTF-8 is the default file encoding in Java 21.
